  1. Trier /
  2. Themes

Trier by interest

Not every Trier trip starts at the Hauptmarkt. Wine travelers start in Olewig, families at the Toy Museum, architecture fans at the Basilica of Constantine.

UNESCO World Heritage

Trier's eight UNESCO sites: Roman monuments, the cathedral, and the Liebfrauenkirche.

Roman Heritage

Porta Nigra, the Imperial Baths, the amphitheater, the Roman Bridge: the old Augusta Treverorum.

Wine & the Moselle

Olewig, Ruwer, and the Moselle: wineries, wine hikes, wine festivals.

Museums

Rheinisches Landesmuseum, Stadtmuseum Simeonstift, and the Karl-Marx-Haus.

Churches & Pilgrimage Sites

Cathedral, Liebfrauenkirche, Konstantinbasilika, St. Matthias, St. Paulin.

Trier with Kids

Amphitheater tours, the toy museum, the Roman-themed bus, and the Petrisberg.

Food & Drink

Moselle wine taverns, fine dining, and wine-house restaurants in Olewig.

Views & Hiking

Mariensäule, Petrisberg, the Olewig Wine Trail, and the Moselle promenade.

Moselle Activities

The Moselle cycle path, river cruises, and passenger boats to Bernkastel.

Shopping

Simeonstraße, Fleischstraße, Brotstraße: Trier's pedestrian zone.

Experiences by GetYourGuide

Tours by interest

Whether it's Roman history, wine or the Old Town, you'll find the right activities in Trier here.

* Affiliate link. Booking via GetYourGuide at no extra cost to you; we earn a commission.

Trier, älteste Stadt Deutschlands. UNESCO-Welterbe, Mosel-Wein, römisches Erbe - Sehenswürdigkeiten, Hotels, Reise-Guides auf einem Portal.
